proof_rows_under_review: Targeted CLI tests prove doctor distinguishes global setup readiness from project init readiness.
Targeted CLI tests prove restore/uninstall consume the right user-scope or project-scope manifest without crossing setup/init boundaries.
Qualification helper flows prove full support requires global setup plus project init and can force-repair duplicate project Stop authority back to the single global managed pipeline.
Tests assert no real home or unrelated repo files are mutated.
Relevant cargo test -p codex1 subset passes.
touched_interface_contracts: codex1 setup global JSON report exposes backup_id when a user-scope manifest is created.
codex1 init rejects duplicate project Stop authority when global managed Stop hook is active unless --force is supplied.
codex1 init --force removes project Stop authority so the global managed Stop hook remains the single authoritative Stop pipeline.
codex1 doctor reports global setup health separately from project init health.
Qualification helper flows require global setup plus project init for full support.
